title: Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Veterans - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Transportation > Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Veterans 26 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions AIDS/HIV Breast Cancer Cancer Medicaid Recipients Older Adults Veterans CLACKAMAS COUNTY SOCIAL SERVICES TRANSPORTATION REACHING PEOPLE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transportation for medical appointments, personal business, and shopping. Priority is given to life-sustaining medical appointments. Rides are provided within Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties. The Ride Together program allows riders to recruit their own volunteer driver (i.e., family, neighbors, and friends). Participants schedule rides with their volunteer driver. Mileage reimbursement is provided, and volunteer training is required. The Vets Driving Vets program matches veterans who volunteer their services with other veterans who need rides to doctors' appointments or to take care of other basic needs. 2051 Kaen Road #135 Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Age 65 and older and adults with disabilities Hours: Transportation services: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 655-8208 3 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY CONNECTION OF NORTHEAST OREGON INC BAKER COUNTY VETERAN TRANSPORTATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transportation to medical appointments for veterans. 2810 Cedar Street Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Veterans Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-4pm Email (541) 523-6591 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY CONNECTION OF NORTHEAST OREGON INC WALLOWA COUNTY VETERAN TRANSPORTATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transportation to medical appointments for veterans. 702 NW First Street Enterprise, OR 97828 Eligibility: Veterans Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-4pm Email (541) 426-3840 1204 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DISABLED AMERICAN VETERANS VA REGIONAL OFFICE OREGON DAV TRANSPORTATION NETWORK PORTLAND VA MEDICAL CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers transportation to and from the Portland VA Medical Center. Does not provide wheelchair-accessible transportation or door-to-door service. 100 SW Main Street Room 212a Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Veterans who have a verifiable appointment at Portland VA Medical Center.
